name: minime

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && powershell -Command "Copy-Item 'src/renderer/settings.html' 'dist/settings.html' -Force"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite build --config vite.main.config.ts --watch" "vite build --watch" "wait-on dist/index.html dist-electron/main/main.js && nodemon --watch dist-electron --watch dist -e js,html --delay 1 --exec \"npx electron .\""

description: minime - 一个住在你桌面上的 3D 小分身
